vocab.meaning: tinh thần đồng đội/đoàn kết trong một nhóm
vocab.example: Being part of the volleyball squad fostered a strong sense of esprit de corps among us.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết, sự gắn bó giữa những người cùng chí hướng
vocab.example: What I loved most about the football club was the incredible sense of camaraderie during our training sessions.

vocab.meaning: khai thác sức mạnh tập thể
vocab.example: Our coach always emphasized the importance of learning how to harness collective strengths to overcome tougher opponents.

vocab.meaning: sự cam kết kiên định/không lay chuyển
vocab.example: Playing for the regional basketball team required an unwavering commitment to practicing every single weekend.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực hiệp đồng (phối hợp tạo ra kết quả lớn hơn tổng thể)
vocab.example: Winning the relay race was the result of a synergistic effort where every member played their part perfectly.

vocab.meaning: những khó khăn/nghịch cảnh trên sân đấu
vocab.example: Dealing with adversity on the field taught me how to remain resilient under immense pressure.

vocab.meaning: lợi thế cạnh tranh/tinh thần máu lửa
vocab.example: Joining a professional swim team definitely gave me a competitive edge that has helped me in my professional life.

vocab.meaning: chiến thắng vang dội trước các đối thủ
vocab.example: Nothing compared to the sheer exhilaration of a last-minute triumph over rivals in the final match.

vocab.meaning: thấm nhuần/hình thành tinh thần trách nhiệm
vocab.example: Being the goalkeeper instils a heavy sense of accountability since the whole team relies on your focus.

vocab.meaning: đội cửa dưới/đội bị đánh giá thấp hơn
vocab.example: I was once part of an underdog team that surprised everyone by reaching the national championships.
